============================================================
  FINANCE AGENT  —  SETUP GUIDE
============================================================

WHAT YOU NEED
  - A Windows computer
  - Internet connection
  - This folder (finance-agent)


STEP 1 — INSTALL DOCKER  (one time only)
  1. Go to:  https://www.docker.com/products/docker-desktop
  2. Download and install it (keep clicking Next / Agree).
  3. Open "Docker Desktop" and wait until the whale icon
     stops moving — that means it is ready.


STEP 2 — START (OR UPDATE) THE APP
  Just double-click:   Update.exe

  A small window opens and does everything for you:
    - downloads the newest version
    - starts the app
    - removes the old version (your data is kept)
    - opens the app in your browser

  The first time it may take a minute or two to download.
  When it says "up to date", you are done.


STEP 3 — OPEN THE APP
  Your browser opens automatically at:

            http://localhost:9000

  If it doesn't, open your browser and go there yourself.
  Upload your invoices or finance documents and start asking.


UPDATING LATER
  Whenever a new version is available, just double-click
  Update.exe again. That's it — same magic button.


TURN IT OFF / ON LATER (optional)
  The app keeps running in the background, even after a
  restart. To fully stop it, open Docker Desktop and stop
  the "finance-agent" containers. To start it again, just
  double-click Update.exe.


NOTES
  - The very first time you run Update.exe, Windows may show
    a blue "Windows protected your PC" box. Click "More info"
    then "Run anyway" — this is normal for new apps.
  - If nothing happens, make sure Docker Desktop is open and
    running, then double-click Update.exe again.
  - Your OpenAI key is already set up in this folder — you do
    not need to change anything. Keep the file named .env
    safe and private.
============================================================
